name: Skewered Barbequed Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok or large frying pan over high heat until it smokes.
2. Add peanut oil to the heated pan, then add ginger and reduce the heat.
3. Add garlic, stirring until fragrant.
4. Stir in tomato sauce, sherry, dark brown sugar, soy sauce, rice or wine vinegar, and hot sauce.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, stirring continuously until it thickens.
6. Pour the sauce into a bowl and let it cool. Place shrimp in the cooled sauce and refrigerate, covered, for at least 8 hours.
7. When ready to serve, remove shrimp from the marinade and shake off excess.
8. Thread the shrimp onto skewers.
9. Prepare a charcoal grill or preheat the broiler.
10. Grill or broil the shrimp until they are pink on one side.
11. Turn the shrimp and cook for a few more minutes until cooked through.
12. Serve the sauce with the shrimp and hot bread.
